title: ButterBee x Fresh Animations
body:
This resource pack is an add-on for [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (made by FreshLX). It adds compatibility for [**ButterBee**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/butterbee)'s animal variants.

If you are using this pack, you **do not** need to also install ButterBee Resources, as this pack includes all of ButterBee's necessary resources.

Just like Fresh Animations, it requires either **Optifine** or [**ETF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[**EMF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).
